response.justification: Strong fullstack profile with 15+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Demonstrates proficiency across the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and has recent AI-agent/MCP experience that directly matches a key requirement. Background spans multiple languages, cloud/Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB, and testing practices (TDD). Some gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically, but the breadth and depth of engineering experience make this candidate a strong fit worth interviewing.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React and recent AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus workshop/teaching experience
Polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang, PHP) with cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned (uses Jest-era testing and unspecified Node frameworks)
Kotlin not listed in skills or experience; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms 2016-2018)
Heavy investment in DLang and side projects may signal divergent technical interests from the primary stack

key_factors.factor: Senior tenure and engineering craftsmanship practices
